command: $musicDirs = @([Environment]::GetFolderPath('MyMusic'), [Environment]::GetFolderPath('Desktop'), [Environment]::GetFolderPath('UserProfile') + '\Downloads'); $exts = @('*.mp3','*.wav','*.wma','*.flac','*.m4a','*.aac','*.ogg'); $found = $null; foreach($dir in $musicDirs) { if(Test-Path $dir) { $found = Get-ChildItem -Path $dir -Include $exts -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if($found) { break } } }; if($found) { Write-Output "Found: $($found.FullName)"; Start-Process $found.FullName; Write-Output 'Playing now...' } else { Write-Output 'No music files found in Music, Desktop, or Downloads folders.' }
description: البحث عن ملف موسيقي وتشغيله لاختبار سماعة البلوتوث
